calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-30-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Deborah Neville

Petitioner Jean Louise Lombard present in pro per, was sworn and examined.

The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Jeanine Zella Lark Lombard

Decree signed in open court.
